designNotes: Redesign of 7-slide tech evolution deck: replace concept abuse with process/case/toc rhythm.

slides.title: 2025 技术演进与商业落地
slides.rationale: Opening title page; hero variant for brand impact.

slides.title: 目录
slides.rationale: 7+ page business deck needs agenda (Rubric A2 anti-pattern fix).

slides.title: 技术趋势概览
slides.rationale: Chapter breathing page before trend content.

slides.title: 趋势一：大模型规模化
slides.rationale: Four evolution stages are sequential, not parallel concepts.

slides.title: 趋势二：多模态融合
slides.rationale: Narrative + key metric; avoids third consecutive concept page.

slides.title: 机遇与挑战
slides.rationale: A vs B structure; not two-column concept text boxes.

slides.title: 行业案例
slides.rationale: Case study with KPI anchor (Rubric C1).

slides.title: 总结与展望
slides.rationale: Closing takeaway with left accent bar; distinct from concept cards.
